message:
bd-222kz: add re-layout debounce + budget guardrails

Add budget-aware debounce to MegaRenderCache to prevent CPU spikes
on complex diagrams. When a layout exceeds the 16ms budget, subsequent
re-layout requests within 50ms are deferred to coalesce rapid input.
Fast layouts bypass debounce entirely for responsiveness.

- LAYOUT_DEBOUNCE_MS (50ms) and LAYOUT_BUDGET_MS (16ms) constants
- Budget tracking fields in MegaRenderCache
- tick() logs budget warnings via status log
- Side panel shows debounce/budget indicators
- 10 new tests for debounce and budget behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
